text: Aaj rishta party ne mere bete ko reject kar diya aur Babuji ne sabke samne taana maara ki Sharma ji ka beta toh kabka settle ho gaya aur main ek baap hokar apne bacchon ko dhang se 'guide' bhi nahi kar pa raha. Mera dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai aur bas rona aa raha hai, samajh nahi aa raha ki parivaar ka saamna kaise karun. Itni ghabrahat ho rahi hai ki lag raha hai saans hi ruk jayegi, solution toh bahut door ki baat hai.

Rishtey walo ke jaane ke baad Mummy ne rona shuru kar diya ki meri 'failiure' ki wajah se khandaan ki izzat mitti mein mil gayi aur 'log kya kahenge' ki ghar ka bada beta hi nakara hai. Main itna toot chuka hoon ki bas akele baith kar sisak raha hoon, na kuch sujhayi de raha hai na koi umeed dikh rahi hai. Dimaag mein bas wahi baatein ghoom rahi hain, agle mahine ke ghar ke kharche ki planning dimaag mein aa hi nahi rahi.

Babuji ne aaj phir comparison shuru kar diya ki padosi ka beta on-site chala gaya aur main yahan breadwinner hokar bhi ek dhang ka rishta nahi la paya. Mera gala rone se bhara hua hai aur flood of emotions ki wajah se main unhe ye bhi nahi bol pa raha ki market ki halat kharab hai. Bas akele baith kar rona aa raha hai, 'kuch nahi hone dunga' wala mask pehenne ki himmat hi nahi bachi.

Rishtey walo ne bete ki naukri par sawal uthaye aur Babuji ne unke samne hi mujhe nicha dikhaya, ab mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai. Bas ek ajeeb sa andhera lag raha hai aur rone ke alawa kuch karne ki himmat nahi hai. Itne saare emotions ek saath aa rahe hain ki main apni health ya BP ki dawai ke baare mein bilkul blank hoon.

Rishta party ne jabse mana kiya hai, ghar mein kalesh shuru ho gaya hai aur Mummy keh rahi hain ki main hamesha Sharma ji ke parivaar se peeche hi rehta hoon. Main itni zyada overwhelm ho gaya hoon ki bas rona nikal raha hai aur lag raha hai ki meri mehnat ka koi mol nahi hai. Solution kya hoga ye toh chhodo, mujhe toh bas is waqt rone ke liye ek kona chahiye jahan koi mujhe inadequacy ka ehsas na dilaye.
